mnemonics.title: Parameter Passing Methods: RBS
mnemonics.content: Remember 'RBS' (like Reserve Bank) for the three parameter passing methods: R = Registers (fastest, limited), B = Block/Table in memory (used by Linux), S = Stack (unlimited, pushed/popped).

mnemonics.title: System Call Steps: TRAP-LOOK-DO-RETURN
mnemonics.content: Remember the system call flow as 'TRAP-LOOK-DO-RETURN': TRAP = execute trap instruction to enter kernel mode, LOOK = kernel looks up system call number in table, DO = kernel executes the handler, RETURN = switch back to user mode and return result.

mnemonics.title: Three APIs: PWJ
mnemonics.content: Remember 'PWJ' (Programmers Want Jobs) for the three major APIs: P = POSIX (UNIX/Linux/macOS), W = Win32/Win64 (Windows), J = Java API (JVM, cross-platform).
